rows.Event Name: Free Wellness On The Green Event
rows.Event Description: Wellness on the Lawn! April 25, 9AM–12PM | FREE Fitness classes, cold plunge, sauna, mimosas, IV bar & giveaways. Free + family-friendly Join us at Desert Ridge Marketplace for the Wellness on the Green Wellness Event on the AMC Lawn from 9AM-12PM for a morning of wellness, movement, and relaxation. Experience multiple FREE fitness classes, including classes from Reformed Pilates, PVOLVE( Jennifer Anisten's fitness company), refresh in our cold plunge and sauna, sip mimosas at our mobile Sip & Stroll bar, and boost your energy at the on-site IV station. Plus, enjoy giveaways, wellness-inspired surprises, and more as you recharge. This free, family-friendly event is the perfect way to glow, flow, and feel your best – don’t miss it!

Connecting through simple topics examined in complex ways, we explore how the human factor can be used as an accelerator of positive change through self awareness, practice, and application. Register today.

rows.Event Name: Exhibitor Registration : School Nurse Organization of Arizona Conference
rows.Event Description: Join us in person for the 37th Annual School Nurse Organization of Arizona Vendor Registration! Get ready to join us in person for an amazing opportunity to connect, network, and showcase your products and services at this long-awaited event. Whether you're a returning vendor or new to the scene, this is your chance to be part of the Arizona school nurse community and make valuable contacts. Don’t miss out on this fun, engaging, and important event where you can truly make a difference! The School Nurses Organization of Arizona invites you to join us for the 36th Annual School Health Services Conference, Dates: June 11, 2026 Location: Desert Willow Conference Center 4340 E. Cotton Center Blvd; Phoenix, AZ 85040 **Scholarship – Many attendees have to pay out-of-pocket to attend the seminar, due to school district budget cuts. SNOA has initiated a scholarship program to assist deserving health office staff with attending the seminar. Any questions please contact: Denise Schooley at: denise.schooley@greathearts.org *Please note as a participant of the School Nurses Organization of Arizona 37th Annual Conference photos may be taken at the Desert Willow Conference Center and used for publicity or general information purposes and may be seen by the general public. SNOA always strives to present individuals in a complimentary, culturally-sensitive and appropriate manner.

rows.Event Name: UNBOUND Cord Cutting Shamanic Breathwork and Sound Bath
rows.Event Description: Join us for a powerful UNBOUND" A Cord Cutting journey combining Breath and Vibration. Releasing blockages and restoring balance. Here we turn inward to reclaim personal power. This ceremony focuses on cords tied to control, obligation, people-pleasing, and self-doubt. Breathwork ignites inner fire, while sound healing stabilizes confidence and boundary integrity—supporting embodied sovereignty. The ceremony brings integration and completion. We release any remaining cords at the heart and crown—old soul contracts, karmic ties, and attachments rooted in love and spiritual identity. This closing ritual supports forgiveness, clarity, and freedom, sealing the journey with grace and alignment. Not all cords are visible—yet they profoundly shape our energy, emotions, relationships, and sense of self. Through the intentional union of Shamanic breathwork guided by Each session includes: The events are open to all who feel called to release old attachments, reset energetic boundaries, and step into embodied sovereignty. ✨ Sound Bath Scottsdale, Phoenix, Mesa, Gelndale, Cave Creek, Fountain Hills, Surprise, Peoria, Tempe. Sound meditation , vibration, frequency, Sound Bath.

rows.Event Name: International Conference of Secular AA 2026 Phoenix
rows.Event Description: Join us in Phoenix, AZ, from November 13–15, 2026, for the in‑person International Conference of Secular AA! ICSAA is where the secular AA community comes together to learn, connect, and grow. Whether you’re a longtime member, a newcomer, or simply curious about secular approaches to recovery, this weekend offers a welcoming space to explore new ideas, meet people from around the world, and strengthen your sobriety. Expect thoughtful speakers, practical workshops, open discussions, and plenty of time for fellowship in a supportive, inclusive environment. ICSAA welcomes: You do Whether you’re attending your first ICSAA or returning to reconnect with friends, we’re excited to welcome you to Phoenix in 2026. This conference is built by people like you — people who believe in sobriety, inclusion, and the power of secular connection. You can book your room at the Hilton Phoenix Resort at the Peak by calling The Daily Resort Charge includes: More hotel information is available on Secular AA’s ICSAA Phoenix page: https://www.aasecular.org/icsaa-2026
rows.Place: Hilton Phoenix Resort at the Peak

rows.Event Name: Bowl Turning With Carbide Tools
rows.Event Description: Bowl Turning With Carbide Tools If you’ve ever admired wooden bowls and wondered how to make them, here is your opportunity! We will guide you step by step through the process of turning your own bowl on the lathe with Rockler’s easy-to-use carbide turning tools. You’ll learn about stock selection, chucking, and different bowl finishes. At the end of the day, you’ll have a bowl to take home!

rows.Event Name: Margin & Mic: A Club for Written & Spoken Word
rows.Event Description: Bring your journal. We’ll provide the prompt. You’ll have time to write, sip something good, and save or share your piece on the mic. Welcome to This is your space to slow down, write freely, and speak your truth (if you feel like it). We’ll start with a prompt to get your pen moving. You’ll have time to sip, write, vibe, and...if the moment feels right, step up to the mic and share your words. No pressure. Just expression, community, and connection. Whether you're writing, reading, or just here for the energy, there's a seat for you.

rows.Event Name: Murder Mystery Dinner Theater Show the Old Spaghetti Factory in Phoenix
rows.Event Description: Date night turns deadly at a murder mystery dinner theater where no one is safe. Get your tickets before it's too late. Join us for the immersive mystery experience everyone is dying to attend! Why watch a show when you can be part of one? This immersive murder mystery dinner theater experience is sure to be a KILLER time! Work with a team of fellow sleuths to unravel the secrets of the mystery, where even YOU can be the perpetrator. Each clue leads you closer to the truth, but it’s up to you and your team to put your skills to the test and solve the mystery before time is up! 2025 July - 1990s Mall Opening August - 1980s Battle of the Bands September - 1920s Mafia Wedding October - Modern Billionaire’s Masquerade Ball November - 1930s Old Hollywood December - Office Holiday Party 2026 January - Modern Billionaire’s Masquerade Ball February- Modern Wedding March -1920s Mafia Wedding April -1990s Mall Opening May - 1930s Old Hollywood June - Modern Wedding Indulge in an irresistible selection of entrees*: Menu Items Spinach and Cheese Ravioli One soft drink (no refills) is included with the meal. There is a cash/credit card bar available for additional beverages. Don't miss out on this killer murder mystery dinner theater experience – reserve your seat today! Don't see the date you're looking for? Call and schedule your own! (888) 643-2583

rows.Event Name: Self-Care City Scavenger Hunt: Based on Hot Habits Series - Phoenix Area
rows.Event Description: Self-Care City Scavenger Hunt – Based on Hot Habits Book Series. A fun hunt in your city to help you explore the sites and build wellness! Revitalize your approach to personal development with our "Self-Care City Scavenger Hunt!" This event harnesses the dynamic VARK (Visual, Auditory, Read/Write, Kinesthetic) learning methodologies to create an engaging, self-guided adventure. Perfect for individuals or groups, it offers a fun and interactive way to explore wellness, which encompasses seven critical areas: Physical, Emotional, Intellectual, Social, Spiritual, Environmental, and Occupational. Our scavenger hunt is designed to support these facets of wellness through targeted self-care habits inspired by our Hot Habits series. Dive into this transformative experience to engage all your senses, explore your city, and create memorable moments that promote personal growth and lasting change. Each aspect of the event is crafted to support habit formation in a way that resonates best with your personal learning preferences, ensuring a fulfilling and transformative experience. Available as an add-on to your Self-Care Scavenger Hunt experience. These guides are your essential companions for building a sustainable habit offering practical, research-backed strategies to help you integrate effective reading seamlessly into your daily routine. Embark on a transformative journey to form your new habit in 90 days, following the 21/90 rule: it takes 21 days to build a habit and 90 days to make it a lifestyle. The guide includes access to an app with daily prompts and tracking features.
rows.Place: *Recommended scavenger starting point or other city spot of your choice! (YOU MUST USE PDF TICKETS EMAILED FOR EVENT- NO MOBILE APP OR QR CODES ACCEPTED)

rows.Event Name: Introduction to Kumiko
rows.Event Description: Introduction to Kumiko Join us for an inside look of Kumiko the Japanese art form of building decorative screens. In this class we’ll dive into the history of Kumiko and its origins. Look at the various styles, tools and jigs used by the masters themselves all while building two decorative 5”x 5” screen tiles in both Asanoha and Izutsu style.

rows.Event Name: CAPM Certification 4 Days Classroom Training in Phoenix, AZ
rows.Event Description: CAPM Certification 4 Days Classroom Training Key Features: • 32 hours of Interactive Classroom • 100% Money Back Guarantee • 60 Days e-Learning Access Included • PMBOK Guide 6th Edition from PMI • CAPM Mock Exams and Mock Projects • Group Activities for better reinforcement • Real world examples from various industries • Industry based case studies • Trainers’ Notes, Sample Question Paper & Case Studies • 23 Contact hours certificate • CAPM exam application assistance • 24/7 customer support About Simplykart’s CAPM® Certified Associate Project Management (CAPM) certification is the topmost professional certification for project managers offered by the Project Management Institute. CAPM training from Simplykart is a unique, power packed, blended mode, career-ready package and one of a kind in the industry. Our training focuses on all the Knowledge Areas and Process Groups provided in A Guide to the Project Management Body of Knowledge (PMBOK Guide – 6th Edition) from an examination point of view to ensure your learning and training objectives are successfully met. What are the prerequisites for the certification? To apply for the CAPM exam, candidates need to have: • Secondary degree (high school diploma, associate’s degree or the global equivalent) • 1,500 hours of project experience OR • 23 hours of project management education completed by the time you sit for the exam Certified Associate Project Management (CAPM)® Course Agenda Project Management Framework • What is a Project? • Programs, PMO, and Portfolios • Project Stakeholders • Organizational Structures • Product Life Cycle, Project Life Cycle, Project Management Life Cycle • Process Groups • Key General Management Skills Project Integration Management • What is Project Integration Management? • Some Examples of Integration Processes • Earned Value Analysis • Project Constraints • Project Assumptions • Project Charter • When should the Project Manager be Identified/Assigned? • Project Management Plan, Project Schedule, and Performance Measurement Baseline • Components of the Project Plan • Preventive Action, Corrective Action, and Defect Repair • Work Authorization System • Role of Stakeholder • Project Management Information System (PMIS) • Lessons Learned • Change Control System • Perform Integrated Change Control • Steps Followed If Customer Requests for Changes • Guiding Rule – Who Can Authorize A Change? • Configuration Management System Project Scope Management • What is Project Scope Management? • Product Scope vs. Project Scope • Processes in Project Scope Management • Plan Scope Management • Scope Management Plan • Collect Requirements • Define Scope • Product Scope Description • Product Analysis • Project Scope Statement • Decomposition • Work Breakdown Structures (WBS) • Work Packages and WBS Dictionary • Inspection • Scope Changes • Control Scope Project Time Management • What is Project Time Management? • Plan Schedule Management • Define Activities • Decomposition • Sequence Activities • Precedence Diagramming Method (PDM) • Activity on Node • Conditional Diagramming Methods • Types of Dependencies • Project Schedule Network Diagrams • Estimate Activity Resources • Outputs of Estimate Activity Resources • Estimate Activity Durations • Historical Information • Analogous Estimating (Top-Down Estimating) • Parametric Estimating • Three-Point Estimating • Develop Schedule • Constraints and Milestones • Mathematical Analysis • Schedule Compression • Simulation, Resource Leveling, and Critical Chain Method • Resource Smoothing • Project Schedule • Schedule Updates, Schedule Baseline, and New Target Schedules • PERT Estimations • Tasks in Network Diagrams • How to Calculate Critical Path for a Network Diagram • Performing Network Analysis • Crashing • Time Management Questions – Practice Project Cost Management • What is Project Cost Management? • Plan Cost Management • Cost Management Plan • Estimate Costs • Estimate Costs – Tools and Techniques • Analogous Estimating (Top Down) • Bottom-Up Estimating • Parametric Estimating • Three-Point Estimating • Activity Cost Estimates • AACE – Types of Estimates • Determine Budget • Project Schedule and Resource Calendars • Cost Baseline • Revised Cost Estimates, Budget Updates, Re-baselining • Control Costs • Control Costs – Tools and Techniques • Payback Period and Life Cycle Cost • Return on investment (ROI) • Present Value, NPV and DCF • Internal Rate of Return (IRR) • Benefit Cost Ratio (BCR) • Opportunity Cost and Sunk Cost • Depreciation • Earned Value Management • Earned Value Management Project Quality Management • What is Project Quality Management? • Quality • Quality Policy • Flowchart • Quality Management Plan • Perform Quality Assurance • Control Quality • Tools and Techniques used for Control Quality • Seven Basic Quality Tools Project Human Resource Management • What is Project Human Resource Management? • Plan Human Resource Management • Human Resource Management Plan • Acquire Project Team • Develop Project Team • Manage Project Team • Handling Conflicts • Maslow’s Hierarchy of Needs • Herzberg’s Theory of Motivators and Hygiene Factors • Conflict Intensity • Management/Leadership Styles • Types of Roles People Play in a Project • Delegation Project Communications Management • What is Project Communications Management? • Importance of Communications Management • Various Forms of Communication and Their Characteristics • Plan Communications Management • Communications Management Plan • Plan Communications Management – Tools and Techniques • Manage Communications • Control Communications Project Risk Management • What is Project Risk Management? • Plan Risk Management • Risk Management Plan • Identify Risks • Perform Qualitative Risk Analysis • Perform Quantitative Risk Analysis • Plan Risk Responses • Control Risks • Utility Function Project Procurement Management • What is Project Procurement Management • Understanding Terms and Concepts • Plan Procurement Management • Make or Buy Analysis • Contract Type Selection • Types of Contracts • Important Fixed Price Contracts • Important Cost Reimbursable Contracts • Procurement Management Plan • Conduct Procurements • Control Procurements • Close Procurements Project Stakeholder Management • Project Stakeholder Management • Identify Stakeholders • Plan Stakeholder Management • Stakeholder Management Plan • Manage Stakeholder Engagement • Control Stakeholder Engagement Professional Responsibility • Responsibility towards PMI • Responsibility to the Profession Who should apply? This course is best suited for: • Project associates and executives • Any professional aspiring to start a career in project management Why Simplykart? Simplykart's training is the best and value for time & money invested. We stand out because our customers • Get trained at the best price compared to other training providers. • Get trained by the best trainer in the industry. • Get accesses to course specific learning videos. • Get 100% Money back guarantee*. Training Fee Early Bird: Booking at least one month prior to the class start date Training Venue Venue will be confirmed to the classroom participants one week prior to the workshop start date and online participants will get the session attendance link before 4- 5 days of the training start date. Venue is finalized one week prior to the start date so that we can accommodate last minute rescheduling from the participants and we do not incur additional cost for rescheduling or cancellation. rows.Event Name: Lean Six Sigma Green Belt (LSSGB) Certification Training in Phoenix, AZ
rows.Event Description: Lean Six Sigma Green Belt( LSSGB ) Certification 4 Days Classroom Training Key Features • 4 days of Classroom Training • IASSC® Accredited Course Material • Mock Exams • Access to Quality Management Webinars • Industry based case studies to enhance learning • Trainers’ Feedback, Preparation techniques and Notes • 35 PDU’s Certificate • 24/7 customer support & Dedicated Learning Consultant About the Course Simplykart’s Lean Six Sigma Green Belt Training program is designed and developed by Lean Six Sigma Experts to ensure that our participants pass the IASSC® Lean Six Sigma Green Belt Certification exam in the first attempt. Our Lead Instructors will give you an introduction to the tools, techniques and methodologies that will empower you to lead Lean Six Sigma projects. Our Lead Instructor provides an in-depth knowledge of all aspects within the phases of six sigma tools, D-M-A-I-C and standard principles of Lean Management with real life applications on various industry used cases. • Define: Clearly, articulate the current state. • Measure: Establish the magnitude of the problem. • Analyze: Systematically establish the reasons for the problem. • Improve: Determine and refine your solutions. • Control: Put the right controls in to sustain the gains. Who Should Apply? Lean Six Sigma Green Belt is most helpful for employees & organizations requiring a standardized approach to problem-solving for the purpose of continuous improvement inQuality Management. This certification is most suited for:  Quality System Managers  Quality Engineers  Quality Supervisors  Quality Analyst, & Managers  Quality Auditor  Any individuals looking forward to lean & practices Lean six sigma principles Why Simplykart ? Simplykart's training is the best and value for time & money invested. We stand out because our customers- • Get trained at the best price compared to other training providers. • Get trained by the best trainer in the industry. • Get accesses to course specific learning videos. • Get 100% Money back guarantee*. Venue is finalized one week prior to the start date so that we can accommodate last minute rescheduling from the participants and we do not incur additional cost for rescheduling or cancellation. rows.Event Name: PMP Certification 4 Days Classroom Training in Phoenix, AZ
rows.Event Description: PMP Certification 4 Days Classroom Training Key Features • 32 hours of Instructor led Classroom Training • 100% Money Back Guarantee* • PMBOK® Guide 6th Edition based training • PMP® Mock Exams and Mock Projects • Group Activities for better reinforcement • Real world examples from various industries • Industry based case studies • Life time access to classroom recordings (for Online class customers only) • Top class Instructors • 35 Contact hours certificate • PMP exam application assistance • 24/7 customer support About the Course Project Management Professional (PMP®) certification is the top professional certifications for project managers offered by the Project Management Institute, USA. PMI’s latest salary survey confirms what businesses, job boards and the media have been proclaiming for the past two years: Project management is one of the hottest professions out there. Your PMI credential — specifically, the Project Management Professional (PMP)® credential — also positively impacts your salary, according to the survey responses of more than 30,000 practitioners in 29 countries. The positive impact is not exclusive to the U.S. PMP credential holders in all countries surveyed noted higher median salaries than non-credential holders — some upwards of 50 percent more. Who needs to attend? Associate project managers, project managers, IT project managers, project coordinators, project analysts, project leaders, senior project managers, team leaders, product managers, program managers, project sponsors, and project team members seeking the PMP or CAPM certification. What is this course about? PMP training from Global Technologies is a unique, power packed, career-ready package and one of a kind in the industry. Project Management Professional (PMP®) certification is the topmost professional certification for project managers offered by the Project Management Institute. What learning benefits do you get from Simplykart’s training? • Establish a common vocabulary and understanding of basic Project Management terms and concepts such as PMBOK®, project, Project management, operations, programs, stakeholders, earned value, scheduling techniques, and project managers’ responsibilities and competencies. • Describe the purpose, inputs, and outputs of the processes in each of the five Process Groups: Initiating, Planning, Executing, Monitoring & Controlling, and Closing • Define the 10 Project Management Knowledge areas & the processes in each. Define & explain the relationship of process groups, Knowledge areas, project phases, project &product life cycle • Demonstrate a clear understanding of what activities, tools, & techniques, are necessary in each phase of a project & understand the PMP® examination nuances • Understand, acknowledge & appreciate importance of risk management. Learn tools and techniques for managing the risks in projects • Overview of Critical Chain Project Management (CCPM) & discussion on concept of Buffer Management. • Help the participants to understand one, understand others, and manage the interface more efficiently & effectively. Understanding the impact of organizational structures on projects • Discussion on project manager’s professional responsibilities. • With the help of case studies, motivating the participants to use the principles of Project Management in their own Work area discussed with the help of case studies. Why Simplykart ? Global Technologies 's training is the best and value for time & money invested. We stand out because our customers • Get trained at the best price compared to other training providers. • Get trained by the best trainer in the industry. • Get accesses to course specific learning videos. • Get 100% Money back guarantee*. rows.Event Name: An Evening with Joe Avati
rows.Event Description: Joe Avati finally brings his award winning show about growing up Italian to Phoenix Arizona. This is a show for all ages Nonna and the kids International Comedy Superstar Joe Avati will make you laugh uncontrollably as he takes you on a trip down memory lane remembering, for better or worse, the good old days. Growing up the son of Italian immigrants in the 70’s and 80’s in Australia and now being a modern day Italian Dad himself has given rise to an endless supply of material comparing life now versus back then. This show is G rated and one that the whole family can enjoy.

rows.Event Name: Camp360 by Fit Organics
rows.Event Description: Join us at Camp360 by Fit Organics for a full immersion into health and wellness, starting on September 21st 2024! Camp 360 is a weekly Saturday workshop established to build rapport with attendees from various lifestyles to enhance their community involvement. The Saturday workshop will cater to the residents of Maricopa County in hopes to bring solidarity, health awareness and bridge the gap between age and social groups. Participants will be instructed on how to properly enhance physical, mental, emotional and nutritional health. The camp is designed to promote detailed health paths that will include healthy meals, physical activity and critical thinking work to establish optimal wellness. Duration of Workshop 7:30 AM (Registration) 8:00 AM – 3:00 PM · (Session 1) 8:00 AM - 10:00 AM (Ages 35+) · (Session 2) 10:30 AM – 12:30 PM (Ages 8-17) · (Session 3) 1:00 PM – 3:00 PM (Ages 18-34) Agenda All workshop sessions are 2 hours each and will consist of: · 1 hour of a classroom/conference course (Topic with instruction & attendee discussions) · 1 hour of Physical Activity (Health & Wellness Fitness) **Session 1 will be served Breakfast prior to start **Session 2 will be served Lunch TO-GO after session **Session 3 will be served Dinner TO-GO after session ***PLEASE DRESS FOR MOVEMENT WITH CLOSED TOE SHOES****

rows.Event Name: Agile and Scrum Certification Training in Phoenix, AZ
rows.Event Description: Master the best of Agile methodologies & its foundations and learn the various Agile variants, including Scrum, Kanban, XP, and their tools. Get introduced to the incredible concepts of Agile and Scrum with this beginner’s skills development course. Learn about the various Agile variants, including Scrum, Kanban, XP, and their tools. Master Agile Project Management (APM) and the 5-stage process for Agile software development before diving deep into Scrum. Agile and Scrum are two versatile methodologies that have proven highly effective in transforming businesses, catalyzing innovation, and accelerating profitable growth. Scrum is the most dominant Agile framework, with a 58 percent adoption rate across organizations globally. Understand how Agile is used in project development, including Agile estimation, planning, monitoring, tracking, and Agile metrics and tools. Gain an understanding of SAFe®, Disciplined Agile Delivery (DAD), and Large-Scale Scrum (LeSS) frameworks and get ready to take advantage of career-defining certification opportunities from global accreditation bodies like Scrum Alliance®, Scaled Agile Inc., and Scrum.org. Leading organizations globally have adopted this powerful framework to improve time-to-market, boost quality, raise employee morale, and become truly adaptive. Agile and Scrum roles are in high demand across industries. Build your Agile and Scrum skills and future-proof your job and business. There are no eligibility requirements to attend the Agile and Scrum training. Everyone is welcome in the world of Agile and Scrum. An Enterprise Learning Solutions (ELS) provider, Learning Zone Inc. creates industry-fit talents through training, coaching, and consulting by globally-acclaimed trainers. Much of Learning Zone’s repute in co-creating business value stems from: Name: Debbie Riel Email: debbie.riel@learninzone.com Phone: +1 302.251.9769

rows.Event Name: Data Analytics Certification Training in Phoenix, AZ
rows.Event Description: The course syllabus is specifically designed to help learners acquire skills for setting achievable goals in the business field. Data analytics is the collection, transformation, and organization of data in order to draw conclusions, make predictions, and drive informed decision-making. Data analysis is a process for obtaining raw data and subsequently converting it into something useful for users’ decision-making. It is a process of inspecting, cleansing, transforming, and modelling data to discover useful information, inform conclusions, and assist decision-making. The Data Analyst certification course will equip you with the latest analytics tools and techniques, how to work with SQL databases and basic SQL queries, the programming languages of R and Python, raw data manipulation, the art of creating data visualizations, and how to apply statistics and predictive analytics in a business environment. To improve your data analysis skills and simplify your decisions, execute these five steps in your data analysis process: An Enterprise Learning Solutions (ELS) provider, Learning Zone Inc. creates industry-fit talents through training, coaching, and consulting by globally acclaimed trainers. Much of Learning Zone’s repute in co-creating business value stems from: Name: Debbie Riel Email: debbie.riel@learninzone.com Phone: +1 302.251.9769

rows.Event Name: Make a Cutting Board
rows.Event Description: Make a cherry cutting board with handle & juice groove! Beginner-friendly. All tools & materials included. In this hands-on woodworking class, you’ll make your own hardwood cutting board complete with a handle cutout and juice groove. Using beautiful domestic cherry wood and a variety of Rockler tools and jigs, you’ll learn fundamental woodworking techniques to create a durable and functional piece that looks great in any kitchen. The finished board will measure approximately ¾" x 12" x 16". What You’ll Do: • Learn to glue up a cutting board blank using Rockler’s Mini Deluxe Panel Clamps • Experience Rockler’s unique “Pay-It-Forward” process — the board you glue will be used in a future class, and you’ll receive a pre-glued board to continue your project • Flatten your cutting board using a drum sander • Square up the board using a table saw • Route a handle cutout using Rockler’s 4-in-1 Cutting Board Handle Routing Template and a compact router • Add a juice groove with Rockler’s Juice Groove Jig • Sand all edges, corners, and surfaces until smooth • Apply a food-safe finish (Odie’s Oil) • Install non-slip rubber feet to complete your board What’s Included: • All materials, domestic cherry hardwood, and supplies • Use of Rockler tools, jigs, and equipment • Rockler safety gear (provided at no additional charge) Important Info: • Class is beginner-friendly — no prior woodworking experience required • All safety gear and materials are included

rows.Event Name: Sharpening Chisels, Plane Irons, and Scrapers
rows.Event Description: Sharpening Chisels, Plane Irons, and Scrapers It is nearly impossible to do good work with dull tools. We will show you how to put a razor-sharp edge on your chisels and plane irons. We will also cover the proper sharpening of scrapers. Feel free to bring a chisel, plane iron and/or a scraper. By the end of the class, you will have sharp tools and the skills to sharpen more!

rows.Event Name: Central Phoenix Screamix Ghost Tour
rows.Event Description: Join us for our spooky adventure through the haunted heart of Central Phoenix! Have you ever wanted to uncover the stories behind some of the most iconic haunted locations in downtown Phoenix — like the legendary Hotel San Carlos or the beautifully eerie Orpheum Theatre? Then this tour is for you. Join us for Central Phoenix Screamix — a haunted history experience where you'll hear chilling tales, learn about Phoenix's fascinating past and paranormal present, and even do some ghost hunting at select outdoor spots using real paranormal tools. Tour Stops Include: 🏨 Hotel San Carlos 🏢 Westward Ho 🏛️ A.E. England Building ⛪ First Baptist Church 🌀 Phoenix Masonic Temple ⚰️ Adams Street Morgue 🎭 Orpheum Theater Why wait until Halloween to get spooky? 🎟️ Tours run every Friday and Saturday at 8 PM 📍Meet by Chase Tower 🔗 Book now at GetGhostedPhoenix.com 🚪NOTE: This is an outdoor-only walking tour—we don’t go inside the buildings, but we do ghost hunt at two haunted locations along the route.

rows.Event Name: Zumba Fitness at Loco Dojo
rows.Event Description: Once the Latin and World rhythms take over, you'll see why Zumba Fitness classes are often called exercise in disguise. Experience the ultimate "exercise in disguise" with Zumba Fitness at Loco Dojo. Our high-energy dance fitness party takes the "work" out of workout by mixing low-intensity and high-intensity moves for an interval-style, calorie-burning experience. Whether you are a seasoned dancer or have two left feet, our Zumba classes are designed for all ages and fitness levels, ensuring everyone leaves feeling energized and empowered! Our Zumba sessions provide a total body workout by combining all the essential elements of fitness: How Zumba DeliversCardioHigh-energy Latin and World rhythms keep your heart rate up and burn calories. Dynamic dance moves engage your core, legs, and arms for total body toning. Fluid transitions and rhythmic movements improve coordination and range of motion. The infectious music and community atmosphere provide a "serious dose of awesome." At Loco Dojo, we believe in a positive transformation that starts with movement. Our Zumba classes are more than just a workout; they are a celebration of what your body can do. Join our vibrant community and discover why Zumba is the world's most popular dance fitness program. Zumba at Loco Dojo is for everyone! We welcome all ages and skill levels to join our inclusive and supportive environment. If you're looking for a fun way to stay active, relieve stress, and meet great people, this is the class for you. Don't wait—sign up now and get ready to dance your way to a healthier, happier you!

rows.Event Name: Table Saw Basics
rows.Event Description: Table Saw Basics This class covers all things tablesaws: what to look for when buying one, setup & alignment, crosscuts, rip cuts, miter cuts, dadoes, and mcuh more, all with an emphasis on using the machine safely. If you’re new to using a tablesaw, or just need a refresher, this is the class for you!

rows.Event Name: Bandsaw Basics
rows.Event Description: Bandsaw Basics Do you want to purchase a bandsaw, but are intimidated by the use of it? Or do you own and bandsaw and are having trouble using it? There is a lot that goes into bandsaw setup and operation. Trying to use one without knowing how to properly and safely, can result in broken blades, inaccurate cuts, damaged wood, and a lot of confusion and frustration. This class will go over the bandsaw, its different features and variables, setup, and how to use them all to get the results you want.

rows.Event Name: Building Shutters
rows.Event Description: Building Shutters The Rockler Shutter System makes making shutters a snap. Woodworkers with modestly outfitted shops, can produce shutters that rival custom made shutters, at a fraction of the cost. Each student will learn all of the steps necessary to design and build plantation shutters. Each student will make a miniature shutter. Shutter making materials are included. Each student will need to provide their own Rockler Shutter Template Kit. Students have the option of bringing their own safety glasses or a pair will be provided.
